full_text: Jofra Archer to Shoaib Khan, Caught by Buttler!! The pace does it again. Shoaib Khan shuffles across to help the pull, gloves it up and Buttler runs back to take a simple catch. Oman shot out for 47.

full_text: Jofra Archer to Shoaib Khan, no run, low full-toss on the stumps, flicked to deep mid-wicket and Shoaib Khan does not take the run

full_text: Adil Rashid to Bilal Khan, no run, tossed up on the stumps, slogsweep and it's in the air but short of deep square leg. On the bounce to Livingstone

full_text: Adil Rashid to Kaleemullah, Bowled!! Another googly and Kaleemullah has no clue. He gets forward to defend, a bit of an inside-edge helps the ball back on to the stumps. Adil Rashid has four.

full_text: Adil Rashid to Shoaib Khan, 1 run, flat good length on leg-stump, turned to the backward square leg region

full_text: Adil Rashid to Shoaib Khan, no run, this has pitched just outside the leg-stump, turns square, beats Shoaib Khan on the defence, hit on the back leg, but they are not interested in the review

full_text: Adil Rashid to Shoaib Khan, , slower and tossed up outside off, the legbreak turns, Shoaib Khan looks for the paddle initially then lets it go but still called a wide

full_text: Mark Wood to Kaleemullah, , Kaleemullah makes room and clears his front leg, tonks the length delivery through mid-off for four

full_text: Mark Wood to Shoaib Khan, 2 runs, full on the stumps, flicked just wide of the outstretched right hand of Brook at mid-wicket, half a chance that

full_text: Adil Rashid to Fayyaz Butt, Bowled!! This googly does the job. Got in line and again Fayyaz Butt did not have a clue, back in and beats the push, past the inside-edge and rattles the stumps. Top-class bowling.

full_text: Adil Rashid to Fayyaz Butt, no run, now the googly and Fayyaz Butt did not pick it, gets forward to defend, misses, rapped on the pads but going down

full_text: Jofra Archer to Shoaib Khan, no run, a maiden from Jofra Archer, short and rising outside off, Shoaib Khan pokes at it and misses, Archer thinks there's something on this as he appeals for a caught behind, nothing and they don't review either

full_text: Jofra Archer to Shoaib Khan, no run, short of length outside off, Shoaib Khan is right behind that and defends to backward point

full_text: Adil Rashid to Fayyaz Butt, 2 runs, Jacks at cover has not spotted that at all, the ball flies to his right, Fayyaz Butt fails to keep the drive down and gets lucky

full_text: Adil Rashid to Mehran Khan, Caught by Moeen Ali!! Straight to slip. A tossed up legbreak outside off, short of the drive, turns and takes the outside-edge, this time Mo makes no mistake at slip.

full_text: Adil Rashid to Shoaib Khan, no run, tossed up on the stumps, Shoaib Khan goes for a big slogsweep and the thick inside-edge hits the leg and stays there

short_text: Mark Wood to Ayaan Khan, Bowled!! Oman are collapsing. A short of length delivery just outside off, Ayaan Khan tries to
full_text: Mark Wood to Ayaan Khan, Bowled!! Oman are collapsing. A short of length delivery just outside off, Ayaan Khan tries to dab and the inside-edge falls on leg-stump and takes the bail off. Six down in 8 overs and this is a sorry state for Oman.

full_text: Mark Wood to Shoaib Khan, 1 run, full on the stumps, driven in front of mid-on for a quick single

full_text: Mark Wood to Ayaan Khan, no run, beautiful delivery, short of length and just outside off, Ayaan Khan is not getting in line, past the outside-edge and nearly clips the off-stump

full_text: Mark Wood to Ayaan Khan, no run, short and at pace on the stumps, Ayaan Khan is quick to duck under

full_text: Adil Rashid to Shoaib Khan, no run, lovely legbreak outside off, loop, drift in and turn away, Shoaib Khan is beaten on the forward defence

full_text: Adil Rashid to Shoaib Khan, , fraction short outside off, Shoaib Khan goes on the back foot and cuts hard and wide of backward point, placed well

full_text: Adil Rashid to Shoaib Khan, no run, again turn on this legbreak outside off, Shoaib Khan gets forward to defend but is beaten

short_text: Adil Rashid to Khalid Kail, Stumped!! Second time in as many matches, Buttler has missed the first time but still gets t
full_text: Adil Rashid to Khalid Kail, Stumped!! Second time in as many matches, Buttler has missed the first time but still gets the decision in his favor. A tossed up legbreak outside off, Khalid Kail stretches to sweep and misses, Buttler misses the first time but gets it on the second. Kail had his back foot out and in the air, did not get it back inside.

short_text: Mark Wood to Kashyap, Caught by Livingstone!! Second in the over for Mark Wood. Not there for the pull, Mark Wood hurrie
full_text: Mark Wood to Kashyap, Caught by Livingstone!! Second in the over for Mark Wood. Not there for the pull, Mark Wood hurries Kashyap on the pull, a tame shot and a dolly to mid-wicket.

full_text: Mark Wood to Kashyap, no run, full and angling into middle, Kashyap flicks and it's in the air but short of mid-wicket

full_text: Mark Wood to Kashyap, no run, good short ball outside off, Kashyap spars at it and is lucky not to edge that

full_text: Mark Wood to Khalid Kail, 1 run, fullish outside off, slashed away as Khalid Kail throws the bat, thick outside-edge lands well short of third man

full_text: Mark Wood to Khalid Kail, no run, short of length and attacking the stumps, Khalid Kail does not get in line, defends it back though

short_text: Mark Wood to Zeeshan Maqsood, Caught&Bowled!! Mark Wood strikes first ball. A short of length delivery on the stumps, st
full_text: Mark Wood to Zeeshan Maqsood, Caught&Bowled!! Mark Wood strikes first ball. A short of length delivery on the stumps, stops on Zeeshan Maqsood a tad? Maybe not. Maqsood closes the face of the bat too early on the flick, pops an easy leading-edge back and Wood takes it.

full_text: Topley to Kashyap, no run, very full on the stumps, dug out

full_text: Topley to Kashyap, , that's a good shot. Seems to have gone all the way. Full and angling away from Kashyap who gets forward and opens the face of the bat to loft it over backward point, good shot and to the shorter side too

full_text: Topley to Kashyap, no run, short of length outside off, punched wide of backward point who gets across and cuts it off

full_text: Topley to Kashyap, no run, beautiful delivery, with the angle, short of length and just outside off, Kashyap spars at it and is beaten

full_text: Jofra Archer to Zeeshan Maqsood, no run, another hurrying short delivery into Zeeshan Maqsood, he tries to pull, misses, gets hit on the glove, is in pain

short_text: Jofra Archer to Zeeshan Maqsood, no run, Jofra Archer can't believe it. Full outside off, Zeeshan Maqsood drives and it'
full_text: Jofra Archer to Zeeshan Maqsood, no run, Jofra Archer can't believe it. Full outside off, Zeeshan Maqsood drives and it's a regulation outside-edge and Mo gets both hands but drops it. Jofra Archer is down on his haunches

short_text: Jofra Archer to Zeeshan Maqsood, no run, short at Zeeshan Maqsood from round the wicket, hurries the batter who mistimes
full_text: Jofra Archer to Zeeshan Maqsood, no run, short at Zeeshan Maqsood from round the wicket, hurries the batter who mistimes the pull to mid-wicket

full_text: Jofra Archer to Aqib Ilyas, Caught by Will Jacks!! This is given out but by Jacks but they are checking. Fingers are underneath and Aqib Ilyas has to depart. A slower leg-cutter on a short of length outside off, Aqib Ilyas guides it to gully, another low catch and Jacks takes it inches from the ground. Oman in early trouble.

full_text: Jofra Archer to Kashyap, 1 run, Kashyap again looks for the scoop, shuffles across and gets something on it according to the ump, off the thigh to fine-leg

full_text: Topley to Kashyap, 1 run, full outside off, Kashyap shuffles across for the scoop, does not get it off the middle but gets a single to short fine-leg

full_text: Jofra Archer to Aqib Ilyas, , beautiful cut and Aqib Ilyas is away. A rising short of length delivery outside off, Aqib Ilyas is on his toes and cuts wide of backward point

full_text: Jofra Archer to Aqib Ilyas, no run, extra pace and zip on this bouncer on the stumps, Aqib Ilyas pulls but it flies over the top-edge

short_text: Jofra Archer to Pratik Athavale, Caught by Philip Salt!! Given onfield. Extra bounce from a short of length outside off,
full_text: Jofra Archer to Pratik Athavale, Caught by Philip Salt!! Given onfield. Extra bounce from a short of length outside off, Pratik Athavale fails to get on top of the cut, spoons it to Salt at cover who has the fingers under the ball as he dives forward. They did not even need to go upstairs as it was given out. No celebrations from England.

short_text: Jofra Archer to Pratik Athavale, , Pratik Athavale gives the charge and takes it on a length, makes room and drives wide
full_text: Jofra Archer to Pratik Athavale, , Pratik Athavale gives the charge and takes it on a length, makes room and drives wide of cover and mid-off

full_text: Jofra Archer to Pratik Athavale, , short of length but down leg, Pratik Athavale flicks and misses

full_text: Topley to Kashyap, no run, short of length and cuts back in off the seam, towards the body, Kashyap fails to nudge it away, hit on the body

full_text: Topley to Kashyap, no run, full and a hint of swing on off, Kashyap is right behind it on the forward defence

full_text: Topley to Pratik Athavale, 1 run, short of length on the stumps, Pratik Athavale is early into the pull, gets a bit of bat, on to the arm I think and then on to body, rolls away to the leg-side

short_text: Fayyaz Butt to Bairstow, , that's the game! This has been a proper thrashing! Shortish delivery on the hips, Bairstow sw
full_text: Fayyaz Butt to Bairstow, , that's the game! This has been a proper thrashing! Shortish delivery on the hips, Bairstow swipes it through backward square leg to get the desired result.

short_text: Bilal Khan to Buttler, , pitched up ball outside off, Buttler clears his front leg and slices it over covers for yet ano
full_text: Bilal Khan to Buttler, , pitched up ball outside off, Buttler clears his front leg and slices it over covers for yet another boundary. 22 off the over

short_text: Bilal Khan to Buttler, , 127kph shortish delivery slanting across Buttler. He lines it up and pulls it with aplomb over
full_text: Bilal Khan to Buttler, , 127kph shortish delivery slanting across Buttler. He lines it up and pulls it with aplomb over cow corner for a 89m six. England are just one hit away now...

short_text: Bilal Khan to Buttler, , slower full ball outside off, Buttler reads it well and slogs it over wide mid-on for a one-bou
full_text: Bilal Khan to Buttler, , slower full ball outside off, Buttler reads it well and slogs it over wide mid-on for a one-bounce boundary

short_text: Bilal Khan to Buttler, , shortish delivery around the hips, bread and butter stuff for Buttler as he nails the pull thro
full_text: Bilal Khan to Buttler, , shortish delivery around the hips, bread and butter stuff for Buttler as he nails the pull through backward square leg to find the fence

full_text: Bilal Khan to Buttler, no run, a low full-toss outside off, Buttler toe-ends the drive to extra cover

full_text: Bilal Khan to Buttler, , shot! Buttler skips down the track, gets close to the pitch of the ball and hits it past the left side of mid-off for a boundary

short_text: Kaleemullah to Bairstow, , short and width on offer, Bairstow cashes in and upper cuts it over cover-point to get off th
full_text: Kaleemullah to Bairstow, , short and width on offer, Bairstow cashes in and upper cuts it over cover-point to get off the mark with a boundary

short_text: Kaleemullah to Will Jacks, Caught by Kashyap!! Will Jacks perishes in a bid to finish this early! Jacks backs away and w
full_text: Kaleemullah to Will Jacks, Caught by Kashyap!! Will Jacks perishes in a bid to finish this early! Jacks backs away and walks down the track. Kaleemullah spots that and shortens his length outside off. He is in an uncomfortable position but still decides to go for an expansive shot. Ends up completely miscuing it towards backward point where Prajapati makes no mistake.

short_text: Kaleemullah to Will Jacks, no run, back of a length ball well outside off, shoots off the deck, Will Jacks slashes and m
full_text: Kaleemullah to Will Jacks, no run, back of a length ball well outside off, shoots off the deck, Will Jacks slashes and misses

short_text: Kaleemullah to Will Jacks, no run, Will Jacks uses his feet to go downtown but the ball seams away and he is lucky that
full_text: Kaleemullah to Will Jacks, no run, Will Jacks uses his feet to go downtown but the ball seams away and he is lucky that it misses the off-stump

short_text: Kaleemullah to Will Jacks, no run, pitched up outside off, Will Jacks swings hard and ekes an inside edge towards short

full_text: Kaleemullah to Buttler, 1 run, back of a length ball around off, some nibble in the air, Buttler swings hard at it and ekes an inside edge towards square leg

full_text: Bilal Khan to Will Jacks, 1 run, short of length ball on middle and leg, Will Jacks hangs back and works it through mid-wicket to get off the mark

full_text: Bilal Khan to Will Jacks, no run, good length ball on off, a bit of extra bounce, Will Jacks covers the line and blocks it towards covers

short_text: Bilal Khan to Philip Salt, Bowled!! Knocked him over! Something to cheer for Bilal Khan and Co. Hard length ball on off,
full_text: Bilal Khan to Philip Salt, Bowled!! Knocked him over! Something to cheer for Bilal Khan and Co. Hard length ball on off, seaming away a bit. Philip Salt looks to pull it across but only manages to get an inside edge which goes on to shatter into the off-stump.

full_text: Bilal Khan to Philip Salt, , Philip Salt is not going to hang around! A slower one but right in the slot. Philip Salt holds a stable base and smacksit over deep extra cover again for a biggie

full_text: Bilal Khan to Philip Salt, , Philip Salt wants to finish this early! Fullish in length and slanting across Salt. He leans into it and smashes it over extra cover for a maximum
